summary: Package Management + Rough Estimates + Brands feature testing complete. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified with all critical elements working correctly.

minor.issue: Requires name and code fields even for partial updates - this is by design but could be improved to allow partial updates

issues: Missing DialogDescription warning in console - minor accessibility issue

critical_code_review_comments: Package PATCH endpoint requires all fields (name, code) - consider making them optional for partial updates
Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - add DialogDescription to dialogs for accessibility
seed_data_creation: Created test packages and rough estimates during testing - prefixed with TEST_ or unique UUIDs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Package Management feature fully tested. 14+ brands seeded (ACC, Ambuja, Asian Paints, Berger, Dalmia, JSW, Pidilite, Tata, Ultratech, Zuari). Multiple test packages created. Planning Board at /planning-board has Packages tab that navigates to /packages.

backend_apis.POST /api/packages: PASS - Creates new package with name, code, tag, base_rate_per_sqft
backend_apis.PATCH /api/packages/{id}: PASS - Updates package (requires name and code)
backend_apis.POST /api/brands: PASS - Creates new brand (returns existing if duplicate)
backend_apis.POST /api/rough-estimates: PASS - Creates rough estimate under package

frontend_ui.Packages page 2x2 card grid: PASS - Shows packages in grid layout
frontend_ui.Create Package dialog fields: PASS - Code, Name, Tag, Rate, Description all present
frontend_ui.Materials tab with Brand dropdown: PASS - Shows 14 brands with Add Material button
frontend_ui.Package card actions: PASS - Lock, Duplicate, Edit, Delete buttons visible
frontend_ui.View Rough Estimates button: PASS - Opens estimates view with G+1/G+2/G+3 sections
frontend_ui.Create Rough Estimate dialog: PASS - Floor config selector and line items table working
frontend_ui.Planning page Packages link: PASS - Packages tab in Planning Board header navigates to /packages
